name: GH_AsynchFileData
summary: This class provides asynchronous methods to keep tabs on a file.

constructors.name: GH_AsynchFileData
constructors.signature: public GH_AsynchFileData(string filePath, bool harvestThumbnail, GH_AsynchFileData.FileChangedDelegate callback)
constructors.summary: Asynchronous constructor. File properties will be loaded asychronously.

params.name: harvestThumbnail
params.doc: If true, thumbnail data will be loaded.

methods.name: Dispose
methods.summary: Releases all resources used by the GH_AsynchFileData

methods.name: UpdateProperties
methods.summary: Updates all file properties on the thread on which this method is called.

properties.name: Callback
properties.summary: Gets or sets the callback delegate to be used when properties are updated.

properties.name: FileCreated
properties.summary: Gets the date at which the file was created.

properties.name: FileExists
properties.summary: Gets whether the file exists. Note that this property returns false if DataExists=False, regardless of whether the file exists.

properties.name: FileLastChanged
properties.summary: Gets the date at which the file was last changed.

properties.name: FileSize
properties.summary: Gets the size of the file.

properties.name: FileThumbnail
properties.summary: Gets the thumbnail bitmap associated with the file.

properties.name: HarvestThumbnail
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether the thumbnail ought to be parsed. At the moment this only makes sense for GH/GHX files.

properties.name: IsFileData
properties.summary: Gets whether the data has been retrieved at least once.

properties.name: FilePath
properties.summary: Gets the location this instance is watching.

properties.name: IsLocal
properties.summary: Gets whether Grasshopper thinks the file it is watching is on a local machine.
